title: Adventurous Pineapple Tart
description: A savory and adventurous twist on a classic dessert featuring blanched pineapple, whole30-friendly and suitable for the Whole30 diet.
instructions: In a saucepan, mix the coconut cream with arrowroot starch until smooth. Cook over medium heat, stirring continuously for about 2 minutes or until thickened.
Fold in the mixed nuts and pineapple slices into the coconut mixture, mixing well to ensure all pieces are evenly coated.
Pour the mixture into a silicone mold lined with parchment paper, tapping out any air bubbles.
Bake for 30-45 minutes until set. Let it cool down before unmolding onto a serving plate.
Serve chilled as a whole30-friendly dessert.
